label: no
cot_prefix: Okay, let's see. The question is about when the telephone booth was fitted. The story mentions that the man from the telephone department got off the bus and went to the tea stall. Then it says, "It was a year ago that the phone line had been installed, six months later men from the public works department had come to put up the phone booth." So, the phone line was installed a year ago, then six months after that, the phone booth was put up. Let me break that down. If the phone line was installed a year ago, that's 12 months. Then the phone booth was added six months after that, so 12 + 6 = 18 months total. But the question is about the process of fitting a working telephone booth. Wait, the phone line was installed first, then the booth. So the booth was installed six months after the phone line, which was a year ago.
